meaning: adj.不能返回(或回收)的,无法归还(或偿还)的
examples: For collinear collision, the preceding collision velocity and post collision velocity are calculated on the basis of the slippage distance and unreturnable distortion of collision vehicle;
She had 13 aces and 30-40 unreturnable serves against Zheng Jie in the semi-final.
But Clijsters upped the intensity in game eight to claim the decisive break and followed it up by racing to 40-0 and converting her first match point with an unreturnable serve.
